title: 8 killed as truck hits 2 vans in Isabela
snippet: Eight people were killed in a road accident involving three vehicles in the town of Aurora in Isabela before dawn yesterday.

title: 3 die as truck hits jeepney in Isabela
snippet: Three people died while eight others were injured in a collision between a dump truck and a passenger jeepney in Luna, Isabela yesterday morning.

title: 8 dead, 7 injured in shooting, mishap
snippet: A barangay chairman, a police officer and two others were killed in a shooting incident during a barangay fiesta celebration here on Saturday night, while a road accident left four people dead in Alicia town also in Isabela yesterday morning.accident

sources.source_snippet: A barangay chairman, a police officer and two others were killed in a shooting incident during a barangay fiesta celebration here on Saturday night, while a road accident left four people dead in Alicia town also in Isabela yesterday morning.accident

title: Transport firm’s 8 buses grounded over road crash
snippet: Eight buses of a transport company serving Northern Luzon have been suspended for 30 days in connection with a fatal road accident in Santiago, Isabela.

title: Father Dies, Daughter Injured in Motorcycle-Bus Collision in Isabela | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: A tragic accident in Malasin, San Mateo, Isabela claimed the life of a 55-year-old man, while his 23-year-old daughter sustained injuries after their motorcycle crashed into a passenger bus.
